title: Garden Delivery Game
description: A playful garden dispatch coach for carrying water slowly, navigating obstacles, cleaning spills, and serving thirsty plants.
learningGoals: Practice carrying control with different containers
Walk with focus while navigating a simple obstacle route
Regulate force and speed so careful movement leads
Build pride in serving plants and cleaning up spills
interactionModel: follow each spoken fill-carry-pour-return mission, watch the calm timer, then tap the large current-step card after the real-world delivery
feedbackModel: playful delivery-dispatch speech with grateful plant reviews and tick, sparkle, and tada SFX; spills become friendly cleanup stops

modes.title: Water Delivery
modes.skill: careful water carrying and obstacle navigation

modes.title: Express Round
modes.skill: repeating the fill-carry-pour-return cycle with control

credits: Kaigani; emoji placeholder art only (see ASSETS.md). Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
